The '''S-CRS''' was a model of aquatic artillery [[Cruiser (aquatic)|cruiser]] employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. It was a vessel with large mounted cannons, developed for shore bombardment and shelling of enemy fleets.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
